name: Holy Aura
description: Shimmering light spreads from you in a 30-foot Emanation for the duration. Creatures of your choice in the Emanation when the spell is cast shed Dim Light in a 5-foot radius and have Advantage on all saving throws, and other creatures have Disadvantage on attack rolls against them. In addition, when a Fiend or an Undead hits an affected creature with a melee attack roll, the Emanation flashes with brilliant light. The attacker must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or have the Blinded condition until the spell ends.
